name: analytics
title: Analytics
description: Multi-provider analytics with PostHog, Umami, DataFast, Google Analytics, Google Tag Manager, and Statsig — all behind feature flags.
docs: Multi-provider analytics. Each provider auto-enables via env vars: `NEXT_PUBLIC_POSTHOG_KEY` (PostHog), `NEXT_PUBLIC_UMAMI_WEBSITE_ID` (Umami), `NEXT_PUBLIC_DATAFAST_ID` (DataFast), `NEXT_PUBLIC_GA_ID` (Google Analytics), `NEXT_PUBLIC_GTM_ID` (GTM), `NEXT_PUBLIC_STATSIG_CLIENT_KEY` (Statsig). Add `<AnalyticsProvider />` to your root layout.
